message:
Node started: Analyze the following three Reddit replies to determine if each is sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1). Provide the result as a 3-bit string (e.g., '010').

Replies to analyze:
[REPLIES_MISSING_IN_PROMPT - Please note: The user provided the question ID and title but did not include the actual text of the three Reddit replies. I will instruct the agent to ask for the replies if they are not provided in the context, or if they are provided in the hidden context, to process them.]
